org.apache.flink.runtime.io.network.api.writer

## Class RecordWriter<T extends [IOReadableWritable](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/core/io/IOReadableWritable.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.core.io")>

  * [java.lang.Object](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/lang/Object.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.lang")
  *     * org.apache.flink.runtime.io.network.api.writer.RecordWriter<T>

  * Type Parameters:
    `T` \- the type of the record that can be emitted with this record writer

Direct Known Subclasses:
    [BroadcastRecordWriter](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/writer/BroadcastRecordWriter.html> "class in org.apache.flink.runtime.io.network.api.writer")

* * *




        public class RecordWriter<T extends [IOReadableWritable](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/core/io/IOReadableWritable.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.core.io")>
        extends [Object](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/lang/Object.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.lang")

A record-oriented runtime result writer.

The RecordWriter wraps the runtime's [`ResultPartitionWriter`](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/writer/ResultPartitionWriter.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.runtime.io.network.api.writer") and takes care of serializing records into buffers.

**Important** : it is necessary to call [`flushAll()`](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/writer/RecordWriter.html#flushAll-->) after all records have been written with [`emit(IOReadableWritable)`](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/writer/RecordWriter.html#emit-T->). This ensures that all produced records are written to the output stream (incl. partially filled ones).

            public void broadcastEmit([T](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/writer/RecordWriter.html> "type parameter in RecordWriter") record)

This is used to broadcast Streaming Watermarks in-band with records. This ignores the [`ChannelSelector`](<../../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/io/network/api/writer/ChannelSelector.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.runtime.io.network.api.writer").

Throws:
    `[IOException](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/io/IOException.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.io")`
    `[InterruptedException](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/lang/InterruptedException.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.lang")`
